email_assets.preheader: Boost your Hartamas property leads with 24/7 AI chatbot & viral video content - limited time offer

body_content.en:
Hi [Agent Name],

Hope you're riding the 2026 Hartamas property wave! With prominent land deals in the pipeline and the market hitting an infrastructure-led peak, standing out is harder than ever.

We're offering Hartamas estate agents an exclusive AI automation package at just RM 499 (one-time payment):
1️⃣ AI Chatbot: Handles client queries 24/7 on WhatsApp, PDPA compliant, supports EN/BM/Chinese
2️⃣ AI Video Toolkit: Turn property photos into 9:16 vertical videos for TikTok/Reels in seconds
3️⃣ Bonus: 5 pre-built property video templates + chatbot setup for Malaysian property FAQs

Save 20+ hours/week on routine queries, close more leads with viral video content. Limited slots for Hartamas agents only.

Reply to book your free demo today!
Best,
Microark AI Team
WhatsApp: +60xxx-xxx xxxx (AI自动化解决方案)

Hai [Nama Ejen],

Tawaran eksklusif untuk ejen Hartamas: Pakej AI Chatbot + Video AI hanya RM 499 (bayaran sekali):
1️⃣ AI Chatbot: Jawab pertanyaan pelanggan 24/7 di WhatsApp, patuh PDPA, sokongan EN/BM/Cina
2️⃣ Toolkit Video AI: Tukar foto hartanah kepada video menegak 9:16 untuk TikTok/Reels dalam saat
3️⃣ Bonus: 5 templat video hartanah + persediaan chatbot untuk FAQ hartanah Malaysia

Jimat 20+ jam/minggu, dapatkan lebih leads dengan video viral. Slot terhad untuk ejen Hartamas sahaja.

Balas untuk tempah demo percuma hari ini!
Salam,
Pasukan Microark AI
WhatsApp: +60xxx-xxx xxxx (#AI自动化)

body_content.zh:
尊敬的[中介姓名]：

2026年哈达玛斯房产市场迎来基础设施带动的增长高峰，大宗土地交易即将落地，竞争激烈程度前所未有！

我们为哈达玛斯房产中介推出专属AI自动化套餐，仅需一次性支付RM 499：
1️⃣ AI聊天机器人：24/7在WhatsApp上自动回复客户咨询，符合马来西亚PDPA合规要求，支持中文/英文/马来文三语

每周节省20+小时重复咨询时间，用病毒式视频内容获取更多买家线索。仅限哈达玛斯地区中介，名额有限！

Microark AI 团队
